name: Hyperliquid Execution Layer
description: Execution and risk-management framework for agents trading on Hyperliquid through a host-provided authenticated client. Covers trade validation, position sizing, funding checks, order confirmation, and safe-mode halts without collecting or managing secrets.
author: Jürgen Wolf

inputs.name: authenticated_hyperliquid_client
inputs.description: Host-provided authenticated Hyperliquid client or signed execution session.

inputs.name: market
inputs.description: Market symbol such as BTC or ETH.

inputs.name: strategy_signal
inputs.description: External strategy output indicating whether a trade is valid and at what levels.

inputs.name: account_state
inputs.description: Current balance, margin, open positions, and daily PnL.

inputs.name: stop_loss
inputs.description: Invalidation price used for risk control.

inputs.name: risk_per_trade
inputs.description: Fraction of account to risk per trade.

outputs.name: trade_status
outputs.description: Decision or execution result such as trade, skip, reduce, or halt.

outputs.name: execution_result
outputs.description: Submission or fill result returned by the host client.

outputs.name: risk_summary
outputs.description: Computed exposure, stop distance, leverage, and daily risk state.
